history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young, slender man with dark, wavy hair is captured in a portrait against a backdrop of a vibrant sunset sky. He is wearing a white t-shirt adorned with a complex, black graphic design featuring graffiti-style lettering and abstract shapes. His hands are casually tucked into the pockets of his black cargo pants. The lighting suggests the golden hour, casting a warm glow on his skin and highlighting the pastel pinks and purples of the clouds. The overall mood is contemplative and stylish, with a hint of urban edge from the t-shirt design. The composition is a vertical shot, emphasizing the man against the expansive sky.
